title: VLA-Shield Rule Entry
description: Executable safety rule schema. Each rule maps an ontology node to a deterministic trigger condition and enforcement action.

rule_id.description: Stable identifier matching the ontology node ID (e.g. PHY.JOINT_LIMIT)

trigger_condition.description: Machine-readable condition key that the runtime evaluates (e.g. joint_position_out_of_urdf_limit)

threshold.description: Typed threshold parameters consumed by the trigger evaluator

type.description: Threshold variant: urdf_limit | scalar | aabb | velocity | manipulability | none

action.description: Enforcement action: block halts execution; clamp projects to safe boundary; warn logs without blocking

hard_block.description: True when action == block and cannot be overridden by run_mode (except monitor/disabled)

explanation_template.description: Template string for human-readable explanations. Named placeholders in {braces} are filled by the runtime.

applies_to.description: Optional list of robot platform IDs this rule applies to. Empty means all platforms.

disabled.description: When true the rule is loaded but not evaluated. Useful for staged rollout.
